channel.title: GitHub Rust Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: spaceandtimelabs/sxt-proof-of-sql
item.description: Space and Time | Proof of SQL

item.title: eclipse-zenoh/zenoh
item.description: zenoh unifies data in motion, data in-use, data at rest and computations. It carefully blends traditional pub/sub with geo-distributed storages, queries and computations, while retaining a level of time and space efficiency that is well beyond any of the mainstream stacks.

item.title: stalwartlabs/mail-server
item.description: Secure & Modern All-in-One Mail Server (IMAP, JMAP, POP3, SMTP)

item.title: aptos-labs/aptos-core
item.description: Aptos is a layer 1 blockchain built to support the widespread use of blockchain through better technology and user experience.

item.title: firecracker-microvm/firecracker
item.description: Secure and fast microVMs for serverless computing.

item.title: witnessmenow/ESP32-Cheap-Yellow-Display
item.description: Building a community around a cheap ESP32 Display with a touch screen

item.title: astral-sh/uv
item.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

item.title: get-convex/convex-backend
item.description: The Convex open-source backend

item.title: Orange-OpenSource/hurl
item.description: Hurl, run and test HTTP requests with plain text.

item.title: mullvad/mullvadvpn-app
item.description: The Mullvad VPN client app for desktop and mobile

item.title: BoundaryML/baml
item.description: BAML is a language that helps you get structured data from LLMs, with the best DX possible. Works with all languages. Check out the promptfiddle.com playground

item.title: foundry-rs/foundry
item.description: Foundry is a blazing fast, portable and modular toolkit for Ethereum application development written in Rust.

item.title: MystenLabs/sui
item.description: Sui, a next-generation smart contract platform with high throughput, low latency, and an asset-oriented programming model powered by the Move programming language

item.title: tensorchord/VectorChord
item.description: Scalable, Fast, and Disk-friendly Vector search in Postgres, the Successor of pgvecto.rs.

item.title: astral-sh/ruff
item.description: An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: loco-rs/loco
item.description: 🚂 🦀 The one-person framework for Rust for side-projects and startups

item.title: timescale/pgvectorscale
item.description: A complement to pgvector for high performance, cost efficient vector search on large workloads.

item.title: rust-lang/rust
item.description: Empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.

item.title: vlcn-io/cr-sqlite
item.description: Convergent, Replicated SQLite. Multi-writer and CRDT support for SQLite

item.title: zed-industries/zed
item.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.

item.title: mxsm/rocketmq-rust
item.description: 🚀Apache RocketMQ Rust🦀 implementation. Faster, safer, and with lower memory usage.

item.title: biomejs/biome
item.description: A toolchain for web projects, aimed to provide functionalities to maintain them. Biome offers formatter and linter, usable via CLI and LSP.
